title: DNeasy PowerSoil Pro Kit Protocol for Increased Sediment Volume & Inhibitor Removal
author: Grayson Huston

steps.title: CREATE 0.5M EDTA, pH 8.0; final volume
steps.instruction: CREATE 0.5M EDTA, pH 8.0; final volume: 250mL ADD 52.025 g Ethylenediamine Tetraacetic Acid, Tetrasodium Salt Dihydrate (EDTA) to a volumetric flask ADD 200 mL DI water to dissolve TITRATE to pH 8.0 with Hydrochloric Acid (HCL, approx. 9.5 mL) ADD DI water to bring final volume to 250 mL AUTOCLAVE solution

steps.title: CREATE 1M Tris-HCl, pH 8.0; final volume
steps.instruction: CREATE 1M Tris-HCl, pH 8.0; final volume: 500mL ADD 78.8 g Tris-HCl to a volumetric flask ADD 400 mL DI water to dissolve RAISE pH to 8.0 with 10 N NaOH ADD DI water to bring final volume to 500 mL AUTOCLAVE solution

steps.title: CREATE a batch of 0
steps.instruction: CREATE a batch of 0.5M Na 2 PO 4 *7H 2 O, pH 8.0; final volume: 250mL ADD 33.508 g Na 2 PO 4 *7H 2 O to a volumetric flask ADD 200 mL DI water and heat to dissolve RAISE pH to 8.0 with 10 N NaOH (approx. 1.5 mL) ADD DI water to bring the final volume to 250 mL AUTOCLAVE solution

steps.title: CREATE 10N NaOH; final volume
steps.instruction: CREATE 10N NaOH; final volume: 40mL ADD 16 g NaOH to a volumetric flask ADD 40 mL of DI water to dissolve

steps.title: MIX Inhibitor Removal Wash Buffer; final volume
steps.instruction: MIX Inhibitor Removal Wash Buffer; final volume: 500mL 10 mL 0.5M EDTA, pH 8.0 25 mL 1M Tris-HCl, pH 8.0 50 mL Na 2 PO 4 *7H 2 P, pH 8.0 415 mL DI water AUTOCLAVE solution Final buffer contains 10mM EDTA pH 8.0 + 50mM Tris-HCl pH 8.0 + 50mM sodium phosphate dibasic heptahydrate (Na 2 PO 4 *7H 2 O) pH 8.0

steps.title: WEIGH sediment samples into a centrifuge-safe...
steps.instruction: WEIGH sediment samples into a centrifuge-safe tube ADD approximately 3x the volume of Wash Buffer to the sediment samples Account for loss of sediment during wash process (e.g., wash 5g if you plan to extract 3g of sediment) If you measure 5g sediment, add ~15 mL of Wash Buffer

steps.title: VORTEX sample at maximum speed for...
steps.instruction: VORTEX sample at maximum speed for 00:00:30 CENTRIFUGE at 1760 x g for 00:10:00 DISCARD supernatant

steps.title: REPEAT steps 6 and 7 three...
steps.instruction: REPEAT steps 6 and 7 three to four times PROCEED with DNA extractions

steps.title: SPIN PowerBead Pro Tube briefly to...
steps.instruction: SPIN PowerBead Pro Tube briefly to ensure that all beads have settled at the bottom ADD 0.5 g of washed sediment to the PowerBead Pro Tube ADD 800 µL Solution CD1 VORTEX briefly to mix

steps.title: SECURE PowerBead Pro Tubes horizontally to a 1
steps.instruction: SECURE PowerBead Pro Tubes horizontally to a 1.5mL-2.0mL Vortex Adapter VORTEX for 00:10:00 ROTATE tubes so caps are oriented in opposite direction VORTEX for another 00:10:00

steps.title: CENTRIFUGE PowerBead Pro Tube at 15000...
steps.instruction: CENTRIFUGE PowerBead Pro Tube at 15000 x g for 00:01:00 TRANSFER all supernatant to a clean 2 mL Microcentrifuge Tube

steps.title: ADD 200 µL of Solution CD2 VORTEX briefly to mix
steps.instruction: ADD 200 µL of Solution CD2 VORTEX briefly to mix

steps.title: CENTRIFUGE at 15000 x g for...
steps.instruction: CENTRIFUGE at 15000 x g for 00:01:00 AVOIDING the pellet, transfer all supernatant to a clean 2 mL Microcentrifuge Tube

steps.title: ADD 600 µL of Solution CD3 VORTEX briefly to mix
steps.instruction: ADD 600 µL of Solution CD3 VORTEX briefly to mix

steps.title: LOAD 650 µL of the lysate...
steps.instruction: LOAD 650 µL of the lysate onto a MB Spin Column CENTRIFUGE at 15000 x g for 00:01:00 DISCARD the liquid flow-through

steps.title: REPEAT step 15 to ensure all...
steps.instruction: REPEAT step 15 to ensure all of the lysate has passed through the MB Spin Column CAREFULLY place the MB Spin Column into a clean 2 mL Collection Tube

steps.title: ADD 500 µL of Solution EA...
steps.instruction: ADD 500 µL of Solution EA to the MB Spin column CENTRIFUGE at 15000 x g for 00:01:00 DISCARD the liquid flow-through and place the MB Spin Column into same 2 mL Collection Tube

steps.title: ADD 500 µL of Solution C5...
steps.instruction: ADD 500 µL of Solution C5 to the MB Spin Column CENTRIFUGE at 15000 x g for 00:01:00 DISCARD the liquid flow-through and place the MB Spin Column into a new 2 mL Collection Tube

steps.title: CENTRIFUGE at 16000 x g for...
steps.instruction: CENTRIFUGE at 16000 x g for 00:02:00 CAREFULLY place the MB Spin Column into a new 1.5mL Elution Tube

steps.title: ADD 100 µL of Solution C6...
steps.instruction: ADD 100 µL of Solution C6 to the center of the white membrane in the MB Spin Column INCUBATE at Room temperature for 00:01:00 CENTRIFUGE at 15000 x g for 00:01:00

steps.title: PIPETTE the liquid flow-through and re-add...
steps.instruction: PIPETTE the liquid flow-through and re-add it to the center of the white membrane in the MB Spin Column INCUBATE at Room temperature for 00:01:00 CENTRIFUGE at 15000 x g for 00:01:00 DISCARD the MB Spin Column DNA is now ready for downstream applications
